utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: There is no back to this couch !

emotion_cause.span: 3_There is no back to this couch !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why are you reading this ? You hate this kind of stuff .

emotion_cause.span: 4_Why are you reading this ? You hate this kind of stuff .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah I know , but I figured a shot you know ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Maybe one of those stories would make me cry and then you would not think I was you know , all dead inside .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh that is so sweet ! Look Chandler I do not care if you can not cry , I love you .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh that makes me feel so warm in my hollow tin chest .

emotion_cause.span: 8_that makes me feel so warm in my hollow tin chest .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , I mean , come on , seriously think about it , we get married , we are up at the altar and I am like this .

emotion_cause.span: 10_we get married , we are up at the altar and I am like this .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I will not care , because I know you will be feeling it all in here .

emotion_cause.span: 11_I will not care , because I know you will be feeling it all in here .
